content.text:
<think>
Looking at the map, the climate threats are: Water stress (yellow, large western area), Extreme heat (orange, central), Extreme rainfall (blue, eastern), Hurricanes (green, southeast coast), Wildfires (pink/red, small areas in west), Sea level rise (purple, small coastal areas).

Sea level rise appears to affect the least land area - just small coastal strips and Hawaii.
</think>

<answer>
Sea level rise affects the least land area. It is limited to small coastal strips (parts of Hawaii and a few mainland coastal edges), shown in purple on the map.
</answer>
